title: The Poems of Nezahualcoyotl: The Poet-King
description: The warrior-philosopher-king of Texcoco composed poems questioning the meaning of existence with unsettling clarity.
introduction: The warrior-philosopher-king of Texcoco composed poems questioning the meaning of existence with unsettling clarity.

translation.text: Is it true that one lives on earth? Not forever on earth, only a little while here. Though it be jade, it will be broken.
